title: Create Tables for Modeled Entities
text: Create Tables for Modeled Entities The suffix used in modeled entity names can be used to group entities into a logical group. For each group of entities: Run the Create Table facility ( /genSql createtable ) to generate SQL scripts to create the necessary tables, indexes and stored procedures. For more information, see /genSql . If you want Sybase to handle referential integrity instead of Uniface: Set the dbms ri connector option in the application assignment file. These scripts enable your application to: Enforce declarative referential integrity constraints and database triggers. Drop declarative referential integrity constraints and database triggers. Check relationships in the database for violations of referential integrity. Add the following to the SQL scripts produced by the Create Script facility: DatabaseName is the database in which the models will be created. use DatabaseName go Copy Execute the SQL script to enforce referential integrity constraints in DBMS. These files should be created for all relationships. Even if the model entities do not include a relationship, referential integrity controls may be required for an overflow table. Run the syb4xext.sql script in all databases in which stored procedures are used. This script creates the generic table existence procedure U4_EXIST_CHECK . Related Links dbms ri Enable Sybase referential integrity controls. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
